/usr/bin/g++ -fPIC -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/cutlass_library_conv2d_sm50_sfprop_optimized.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libcutlass_conv2d_sm50_sfprop_optimized.so -o libcutlass_conv2d_sm50_sfprop_optimized.so @CMakeFiles/cutlass_library_conv2d_sm50_sfprop_optimized.dir/objects1.rsp @CMakeFiles/cutlass_library_conv2d_sm50_sfprop_optimized.dir/linkLibs.rsp -L"/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs" -L"/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib"
